title: My Job to Care
lesson: Looking after a pet every day teaches you to be responsible and caring.
prompts: Place the person from the input image into a cozy living room in the morning. The person from the input image sits on the far left gently holding a small fluffy brown puppy, facing the camera with a delighted smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby smiling warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image stands on the far left, facing the camera with an attentive expression and the face fully visible, listening as a small brown puppy sits at their feet. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} points to a pet food bowl and a water bowl, explaining. Warm kitchen light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image kneels alone pouring kibble into a pet bowl for a small brown puppy, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a caring, focused expression. The puppy waits happily beside the bowl. Warm morning light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image walks on the far left in a sunny garden holding a leash, facing the camera with a cheerful smile and the face fully visible, as a small brown puppy trots along on the leash to the right. Bright daylight, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image sits alone gently brushing and cuddling the small brown puppy, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, with a tender, happy expression. Cozy living room, warm light, soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The person from the input image sits on the far left with the healthy, happy puppy in their lap, facing the camera with a proud, joyful smile and the face fully visible. On the right, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} gives a warm, approving smile. Golden afternoon light, heart-warming soft storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
